Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Adrian Cardoza.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Erma Lee Bobb is present.
Attorney Patrick Hill for defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JAN-19-2016 is vacated. (JPT/501)
